query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of a surface composed of hundreds of small, irregular polygonal pieces with reflective and translucent qualities. The angular segments, set at varying inclinations, exhibit a palette of white, pale gray, silver, beige, and near-black tones, separated by dark dividing lines. Light reflects off the angled facets, producing bright highlights and faint, distorted mirror images of the surroundings within individual fragments.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph depicting a severely fragmented surface shattered into hundreds of small, irregular polygonal shards. The image abandons representational clarity in favor of geometric texture and pattern, presenting broken, glass-like pieces in muted whites, silvers, and warm reflected beige tones amid dark fissures. The fractured composition communicates entropy and material decay, with the disintegrating surface creating a chaotic mosaic of angled voids and reflective facets.
